pages.text: Perhaps driven by the peculiar madness of dark mages, you've blended lethal toxins with rice to create this revolting concoction even you can scarcely stomach.$(br)After repeatedly enduring its nauseating flavor and potent toxicity, your body gradually develops tolerance to the virulent compounds.$(br)Alternatively, force-feeding it to others remains a viable option.

Can be fed to other creatures.$(br)Grants consumer (or victim):$(br)$(li)1-minute 40-second Nausea, Poison X, Weakness V$(li)Upon repeated consumption, grants immunity to negative effects:$(li2)After 5 servings: Nausea immunity$(li2)After 10 servings: Poison immunity$(li2)After 15 servings: Weakness immunity$(br)Right-click any entity to confer identical buffs while consuming the item.

A meal steeped in five venoms, requiring tremendous willpower to overcome the trepidation of consumption.$(br)While it grants disease immunity upon ingestion, few would willingly endure repeated servings.$(br)Fortunately, it can also be wielded as a weapon to smear across unsuspecting mouths.
